name: text-to-speech-learning-tool
description: 原创界面的文字转语音学习工具桌面应用
author: Codex

scripts.generate:icons: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const cp=require('child_process'); fs.mkdirSync('build/icons',{recursive:true}); cp.execFileSync('sips',['-s','format','png','--resampleHeightWidth','512','512','build/brand-icon.svg','--out','build/icon.png'],{stdio:'ignore'});" && icon-gen -i build/brand-icon.svg -o build/icons
scripts.dist:mac: npm run generate:icons && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --mac zip
scripts.dist:win: npm run generate:icons && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win portable --x64
scripts.dist: npm run generate:icons && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --mac zip --win portable --x64
